name: channel-scoped-notification-uri
description: SessionAddedParams carries a root channel URI, a required session summary, and an unknown wire key. Runtime-decoder clients (Go, Swift, Rust, Kotlin) drop the unknown key on re-encode — that is the intended canonical behavior expressed in acceptableOutputs[0]. TypeScript has no runtime decoder (JSON.parse/stringify preserves unknown keys verbatim), so it cannot produce the canonical dropped form; its expected output is the input preserved verbatim, expressed in typescriptOutput. This is a documented structural exception, not a blessed divergence — TypeScript is asserted against typescriptOutput, never skipped.
